title: Shaqra Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Shaqra, with a Z-Score of +5.26. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Shaqra is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 17.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 11%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is moderate at 14.2 km/h. 
 These conditions are leading to a high risk of heat-related illnesses and discomfort, especially for vulnerable populations.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate risks.
